summary: Tested single photo upload enhancement: POST /api/students/{student_id}/photo endpoint and edit modal photo UI. All backend tests (10/10) and frontend UI checks passed.
seed_data_creation: Uploaded test photo to stu_ac501dd5 (Liam Wilson) for UI testing — left in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo upload enhancement fully tested. POST /api/students/{student_id}/photo works (upload, resize to 400x400, save to /app/uploads/student_photos/{id}.jpg, update DB). DELETE regression still works. Edit modal requires bulkEditMode=true (click 'Edit' button in filter bar). data-testid attributes: edit-modal-photo-area, edit-modal-photo-input (accept=image/*), edit-modal-photo (img when has photo), remove-photo-btn (X, only when photo_url set). Hint text shows 'Click to add photo' or 'Click photo to replace' correctly.
